text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper itself is real — published at CVPR 2021 with authors Sijie Yan, Yuanjun Xiong, Kaustav Kundu, Shuo Yang, Siqi Deng, Meng Wang, Wei Xia, and Stefano Soatto. However, the cited authors (L. Zhou, Y. Zheng, T. Li, Y. Wang) do not match any of the real authors, and the cited year (2024) is wrong (the paper appeared in CVPR 2021). This is a classic hallucination pattern: a real title grafted onto fabricated author names and an incorrect year.
LINK: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2021/html/Yan_Positive-Congruent_Training_Towards_Regression-Free_Model_Updates_CVPR_2021_paper.html
